p.span: Ground Bolt Used on Painted Panels

text.tspan: Ground Bolt Used on Painted Panels

p.span: Using this bolt on aluminum blocks will damage the screw hole of the block.

text.tspan: Using this bolt on aluminum blocks will damage the screw hole of the block.

p.span: Never use this bolt on aluminum blocks.

text.tspan: Never use this bolt on aluminum blocks.

p.span: The bolts are specially designed to get good metal-to-metal contact on painted panels.

text.tspan: The bolts are specially designed to get good metal-to-metal contact on painted panels.

p.span: Be sure to use the specified ground bolt.

text.tspan: Be sure to use the specified ground bolt.

p.span: Using an ordinary bolt can cause poor grounding on painted panels.

text.tspan: Using an ordinary bolt can cause poor grounding on painted panels.

p.span: This ground bolt is not used on the engine block, the transmission case or the steering

text.tspan: This ground bolt is not used on the engine block, the transmission case or the steering

p.span: Identify the bolt with the paint-scratch shape (1) on the screw.

text.tspan: Identify the bolt with the paint-scratch shape (1) on the screw.
